# FSB (Full Self-Browsing)

FSB (Full Self-Browsing) is an open-source Chrome extension that automates the browser through natural language. You describe a task; FSB plans the clicks, types, and navigation to complete it. Multi-model AI (xAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, local), 50+ browser actions, 142+ site guides, local-first execution, and BYO API keys.

FSB also works as an MCP browser layer for AI agents. Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenClaw, and other MCP clients can use FSB to operate a real Chrome browser, which is useful for app testing, browser-state inspection, and agent workflows that need to act, observe, verify, and iterate. The About page includes real demo videos for Grok 4.1 e-commerce autopilot, Codex MCP flight booking, OpenClaw monitoring, and Claude-powered browser iteration.

## Docs

- [About](https://full-selfbrowsing.com/about): Watch FSB drive Google, search Amazon, and book travel autonomously.
- [Support](https://full-selfbrowsing.com/support): Setup guides, troubleshooting, GitHub issues, and direct contact.
- [Privacy](https://full-selfbrowsing.com/privacy): How FSB handles your data -- API keys encrypted in Chrome local storage, no telemetry.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/lakshmanturlapati/FSB): BSL 1.1 source code, install instructions, issue tracker.
- [llms-full.txt](https://full-selfbrowsing.com/llms-full.txt): Long-form project dump for LLM ingestion -- capabilities, install, comparison framing.

## Demo Videos

- [FSB: E-Commerce Autopilot by Grok 4.1](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_iQ4_LSXcTU)
- [Flight Booking: Powered by Codex MCP](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WbpOrFwgGME)
- [OpenClaw Monitoring Doge Price](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PNTGCWGopf8)
- [An Aha Moment by Claude Opus 4.7](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mD9oGB2JqVM)
- [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@parzival5707)
